title: SimplyCraft
description: SimplyCraft a modpack designed for comfort and simplicity. It brings you quality-of-life improvements, a smoother interface, and handy features without overloading the game.
body:
# SimplyCraft

**SimplyCraft** is a modpack made for players who value simplicity and comfort in Minecraft.  
It includes only the most essential quality-of-life mods that make the game smoother, easier, and more enjoyable — without unnecessary complexity.

## Features
- 🌿 Enhanced interface: cleaner menus, better tooltips, and improved navigation.  
- ⚡ Handy utilities: quick inventory access, crafting optimizations, and useful in-game info.  
- 🎮 Easy to pick up: perfect for both new and experienced players.  
- 🛠 Optimized performance: lightweight mods that won’t overload your game.  

## Who is it for?
- Players who enjoy **vanilla Minecraft**, but want a bit more convenience.  
- Those who are tired of bulky, overcomplicated modpacks.  
- Beginners looking for a smooth and accessible experience.  

## Conclusion
**SimplyCraft** keeps Minecraft just the way you love it — but a little more comfortable.  
Simple, lightweight, and made to enhance your gameplay experience.
